auth.loginSubtitle: Sign in to your PoultryManager account
auth.loginPrompt: Sign in to continue managing your operations.
auth.terms: By creating an account you accept our Terms.
auth.firstLoginSubtitle: For security, please change the temporary password you received before continuing.
auth.firstLoginHint: Pick a strong password — at least 8 characters.
auth.forgotPasswordHint: Please contact your administrator to reset your password.
auth.passwordMin: Password must be at least 8 characters

modules.title: Select Modules
modules.subtitle: Choose which modules you need access to
modules.broilerDesc: Complete broiler chicken raising management — batches, cycles, health, sales
modules.eggProductionDesc: Layer hen and egg production tracking
modules.equipmentDesc: Equipment suppliers and farm equipment marketplace
modules.selectAtLeastOne: Please select at least one module

dashboard.noWidgets: No dashboard widgets available for your role.
dashboard.noActiveBatchesDesc: Start by creating your first batch to see your dashboard come alive.

accounting.noViewsDesc: Your account does not have any modules with accounting views, or you lack permission to view them.

directory.subtitle: People, places, and feed registered to your account

settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: Manage your account, team, and preferences
settings.profileDesc: Update your personal details and business information
settings.logoutConfirm: Are you sure you want to log out?
settings.portionRatesHint: Per-piece rates used as defaults when creating sale invoices
settings.saleDefaultsDesc: Set default selling rates for poultry portions and transportation. These rates pre-fill when creating sale orders and can be overridden per invoice.
settings.accountingDesc: Configure your country and VAT rate for invoicing and expense calculations
settings.invoiceLanguageDesc: Language used for generated PDF invoices
settings.businessInfoDesc: Your company details linked to this account
settings.securityDesc: Update your password to keep your account secure
settings.teamDesc: Manage who has access to your account
settings.editUserDesc: Update this team member's details and role
settings.addUserDesc: Add a new team member with a specific role
settings.noTeamMembersDesc: Add team members to give them access to your account with specific roles and permissions.
settings.tempPasswordNote: A temporary password will be generated. Share it securely with the user.
settings.tempPasswordDesc: Share these credentials securely with the new team member. They should change their password after first login.
settings.tempPasswordWarning: This password will not be shown again. Make sure to copy it now.
settings.modulesDesc: Modules you have access to on your account

contacts.subtitle: Manage your contact book

contacts.notesPlaceholder: Add any notes about this contact...

contacts.deleteContactWarning: This will permanently delete this contact and cannot be undone.

location.shareLocationHint: Send a link via any app

businesses.title: Businesses
businesses.subtitle: Manage your business directory
businesses.addBusinessDesc: Add a new business to your directory
businesses.noBusinessesDesc: Add your first business to start building your directory.
businesses.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this business?
businesses.deleteBusinessWarning: This will permanently delete this business and cannot be undone.
businesses.statementsComingSoonDesc: Generate statements from the desktop dashboard for now.
businesses.addressSectionHint: Full business address is required for VAT-compliant invoicing. Use the search to auto-fill from Google Maps or enter manually.
businesses.addressLookupHint: Search for a business name or address to auto-fill all address fields from Google Maps.
businesses.addressVatWarning: A complete business address is required for VAT-compliant invoices. Please fill in the address fields above.

detail.title: Business Details
detail.noTransfers: No transfers yet for this business

businesses.deleteWarning: This will permanently delete this business and cannot be undone.

transfers.title: Transfers
transfers.addTransferDesc: Record a new payment or transfer
transfers.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this transfer?
transfers.deleteTransferWarning: This will permanently delete this transfer and cannot be undone.

farms.title: Farms
farms.subtitle: Manage your farm locations and details
farms.addFarmDesc: Register a new farm and link it to a business
farms.linkBusinessHint: Link a business from your directory to auto-fill licensing and registration details. Fields inherited from the business will be kept in sync.
farms.farmIdentityHint: The farm name defaults to the linked business name. You can also assign a short nickname for quick identification across the platform.
farms.logoHint: SVG, PNG, JPG or WebP — 1:1 or 2:1 ratio, 128–2056 px
farms.nicknameHint: Choose a short, uppercase nickname (3–8 characters). This will be used throughout the platform to identify this farm — pick something related to the business name for easy recognition.
farms.farmTypeHint: Select the type of operation this farm performs. This determines the context of capacity and other metrics.

farmTypeDescriptions.broiler: Grow birds for meat production across broiler houses.
farmTypeDescriptions.hatchery: Manage incubation and chick hatching operations.
farmTypeDescriptions.free_range: Raise birds with indoor housing and outdoor access.
farmTypeDescriptions.layer_eggs: Operate laying houses for table egg production.
farmTypeDescriptions.slaughterhouse: Process birds through slaughter and packing lines.

farms.capacityQuickHint: A default house will be created with this capacity. You can add more houses later.
farms.licensingHint: Trade license and tax registration details are stored on the linked business. Changes here update the business directly.
farms.locationHint: Pin the exact location of your farm on the satellite map. Search by area name, coordinates, or drag the marker to the precise spot.
farms.searchLocation: Search by area, address, or coordinates…
farms.noFarmsDesc: Register your first farm to start managing your poultry operations.
farms.deleteFarmWarning: This will permanently delete this farm and cannot be undone.
farms.licenseFromBusinessHint: Trade License and TRN are managed on the linked business.
farms.noHousesYet: No houses yet. Add one below.
farms.mapKeyMissing: Google Maps API key not configured.
farms.mapKeyMissingHint: Set EXPO_PUBLIC_GOOGLE_MAPS_API_KEY in mobile/.env and rebuild.
farms.addNewBusinessHint: Quickly create a business and link it
farms.noBatchesDesc: Performance data will appear here once you start running batches on this farm.
farms.noFarmFeedOrders: No feed orders for this farm

detail.noBatches: No batches have been created for this farm yet.

workers.title: Workers
workers.subtitle: Manage your workforce
workers.addWorkerDesc: Add a new worker to your directory
workers.noWorkersDesc: Add your first worker to start managing your workforce.
workers.deleteWarning: This will permanently delete this worker and their associated contact record. This action cannot be undone.
workers.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this worker?
workers.deleteWorkerWarning: This will permanently delete this worker and cannot be undone.
workers.editAssignmentsHelp: Select the houses this worker is responsible for. They will only see daily logs and houses in these locations.
workers.linkContactHint: Optionally link an existing contact to avoid duplicates
workers.roleHint: Select the worker's role on the farm. This helps organise your workforce by responsibility.

batches.title: Batches
batches.subtitle: Manage your broiler production cycles
batches.addBatchDesc: Create a new production batch for a farm
batches.noBatchesDesc: Create your first batch to start tracking a production cycle.
batches.deleteWarning: This will permanently delete this batch. This action cannot be undone.
batches.deleteWarningWithCounts: This will permanently delete this batch along with {{items}}. This action cannot be undone.
batches.feedUntracked: Add feed orders to track inventory
batches.addSourceDesc: Log a new chick delivery from a hatchery
batches.noSourcesDesc: Add a source entry to log chick deliveries from hatcheries.
batches.deleteSourceWarning: This will permanently delete this source entry and its associated expense. This action cannot be undone.
batches.expensesDesc: All expenses associated with this batch
batches.addExpenseDesc: Add a new expense to this batch
batches.noExpensesDesc: Add expenses to track costs for this batch.
batches.deleteExpenseWarning: This will permanently delete this expense. This action cannot be undone.
batches.deleteExpenseSourceWarning: This will permanently delete this expense and its associated source entry. This action cannot be undone.
batches.deleteExpenseSaleOrderWarning: This will permanently delete this expense and its associated sale order. This action cannot be undone.
batches.viewExpenseDesc: This expense was auto-generated from a source entry
batches.addFeedOrderDesc: Place a new feed order for this batch
batches.noFeedOrdersDesc: Place a feed order to track feed purchases for this batch.
batches.deleteFeedOrderWarning: This will permanently delete this feed order, its line items, and the associated expense. This action cannot be undone.
batches.deleteExpenseFeedOrderWarning: This will permanently delete this expense and its associated feed order with all line items. This action cannot be undone.
batches.feedCompanyHint: Suppliers with catalogue products are listed first.
batches.selectFeedCompanyFirst: Select a feed company to add line items.
batches.salesDesc: Sales of chickens from this batch
batches.addSaleDesc: Create a new sale order for this batch
batches.noSalesDesc: Create a sale order to record chicken sales from this batch.
batches.deleteSaleWarning: This will permanently delete this sale order and its associated processing expense. This action cannot be undone.

saleForm.processingCostHint: Total amount on the slaughter invoice incl. VAT
saleForm.liveComingSoonDesc: Live sales will be available in a future update

operations.addEntryDesc: Log a new daily entry for this house
operations.noEntriesDesc: Start logging daily data for this house.
operations.dateBeforeStart: Date cannot be before the batch start date
operations.deleteWarning: This will permanently delete this entry. This action cannot be undone.
operations.existingEntry: An entry already exists for this date — editing it
operations.duplicateExists: An entry of this type already exists for this date. Would you like to edit it?
operations.selectEntry: Select an entry to view details

feed.title: Feed Catalogue
feed.subtitle: Manage your feed products and pricing
feed.addFeedItemDesc: Add a new feed product to your catalogue
feed.editFeedItemDesc: Update this feed product's details and pricing
feed.noFeedItemsDesc: Add your first feed product to start building your catalogue.
feed.deleteWarning: This will permanently delete this feed item from your catalogue. This action cannot be undone.
feed.deleteFeedItemWarning: This will permanently delete this feed item and cannot be undone.
feed.filterByTypeDesc: Show only the selected feed types
feed.pricingHint: Subtotal, VAT, and total per unit are calculated automatically.
feed.isActiveHint: Inactive items are hidden from new feed orders.
feed.feedTypeHint: Select the type of feed this product represents

documents.addDocDesc: Name your document and upload the file
documents.dragOrClick: Drag & drop or click to upload
documents.noPhotosYet: No photos yet — capture multiple in one go or pick from your gallery.
documents.uploadHintImage: Add photos via the camera, your gallery, or pick any local file using the buttons below.
documents.uploadHintFile: Capture with the camera or pick any local file using the buttons below.
documents.cameraPermissionPrompt: Allow camera access to take photos.
documents.tapShutterHint: Tap the shutter to capture. Stack up multiple photos and submit them all together.

sync.title: Sync Status
sync.fullResyncBodyClean: This will clear all local data and re-download everything from the server.
sync.fullResyncBodyPending_one:
This will clear all local data and re-download from the server.

You have {{count}} unsynced change that will be lost.
sync.fullResyncBodyPending_other:
This will clear all local data and re-download from the server.

You have {{count}} unsynced changes that will be lost.
sync.discardChangeBody: Discard this failed {{action}} on {{entity}}? This cannot be undone.
sync.overlayInitialSubtitle: Downloading your data so it works offline. This only happens once.
sync.overlayResyncSubtitle: Clearing local cache and re-downloading from the server.
